name: quant-stock-technical
description: Deterministic, numbers-only daily stock technical analysis for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Calculate reproducible short-, medium-, and long-horizon opinions, risk, price levels, and a 0-100 score from completed daily adjusted OHLCV data.
defaultPrompt: Analyze a stock from completed daily OHLCV CSV files.
Calculate deterministic entry, stop, target, and score levels.
